inputs.label: Wake Time
inputs.businessContext: The hour of day when the worker typically wakes up (24-hour format)

businessContext_i18n.en: The hour of day when the worker typically wakes up (24-hour format)
businessContext_i18n.tr: İşçinin tipik olarak uyandığı günün saati (24 saat formatı)
businessContext_i18n.de: Die Stunde des Tages, zu der der Arbeiter normalerweise aufwacht (24-Stunden-Format)
businessContext_i18n.fr: Heure à laquelle le travailleur se réveille généralement (format 24h)
businessContext_i18n.es: Hora del día en que el trabajador se despierta normalmente (formato 24 horas)

inputs.label: Current Time
inputs.businessContext: The hour of day for which alertness is to be predicted

businessContext_i18n.en: The hour of day for which alertness is to be predicted
businessContext_i18n.de: Die Stunde des Tages, für die die Wachsamkeit vorhergesagt werden soll
businessContext_i18n.fr: Heure pour laquelle la vigilance doit être prédite
businessContext_i18n.es: Hora del día para la que se va a predecir el nivel de alerta

inputs.label: Sleep Duration
inputs.businessContext: Duration of prior sleep, affecting baseline alertness (optional use)

businessContext_i18n.en: Duration of prior sleep, affecting baseline alertness (optional use)
businessContext_i18n.tr: Önceki uykunun süresi, temel uyanıklığı etkiler (isteğe bağlı kullanım)
businessContext_i18n.de: Dauer des vorherigen Schlafs, die die Basiswachsamkeit beeinflusst (optional)
businessContext_i18n.fr: Durée du sommeil antérieur, affectant la vigilance de base (utilisation facultative)
businessContext_i18n.es: Duración del sueño previo, que afecta la alerta basal (uso opcional)

inputs.label: Circadian Amplitude
inputs.businessContext: Typical amplitude of circadian alertness fluctuation (deviation from baseline)

businessContext_i18n.en: Typical amplitude of circadian alertness fluctuation (deviation from baseline)
businessContext_i18n.tr: Sirkadiyen uyanıklık dalgalanmasının tipik genliği (temel değerden sapma)
businessContext_i18n.de: Typische Amplitude der zirkadianen Wachsamkeitsschwankung (Abweichung vom Basiswert)
businessContext_i18n.fr: Amplitude typique de la fluctuation de la vigilance circadienne (écart par rapport à la ligne de base)
businessContext_i18n.es: Amplitud típica de la fluctuación circadiana de la alerta (desviación de la línea base)

inputs.label: Baseline Alertness
inputs.businessContext: Baseline alertness level after adequate sleep, typically 70 (scale 0-100)

businessContext_i18n.en: Baseline alertness level after adequate sleep, typically 70 (scale 0-100)
businessContext_i18n.tr: Yeterli uykudan sonra temel uyanıklık seviyesi, tipik olarak 70 (0-100 ölçeği)
businessContext_i18n.fr: Niveau de vigilance de base après un sommeil adéquat, généralement 70 (échelle 0-100)
businessContext_i18n.es: Nivel de alerta basal después de un sueño adecuado, normalmente 70 (escala 0-100)

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
